name: borrower-cosigner-guarantor
rationale: Primary borrower with cosigner/guarantor (e.g., parent guaranteeing adult child's mortgage; cosigner not on title, only on the loan note). Distinct from joint: cosigner has financial obligation but typically no title interest. Layer 3: does Vienna's canonical_map distinguish cosigner from co-applicant? If primary's qualifying-income alone is insufficient, does cosigner income aggregate per cosigner-specific rules? Likely FRANCO-INPUT-REQUIRED: cosigner policy intersects lender-relationship expectations.
notes: Single-event sequence. Marcus Webb primary; Patricia Webb (mother) as cosigner-only. Fixture surfaces the cosigner distinction; spec resolves canonical_map shape.
